question: Which state is in both of these groups: the states ranked 6th through 10th by the median total labor force participation rate as of October 2019, and the states ranked 8th through 12th by the sample standard deviation of the number of days transit agencies provided revenue service during the 2022 fiscal year? Respond with [Answer].

1.fact:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

source = "datagov/choose-maryland-compare-states-workforce/files/rows.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), low_memory=False)

us_states = [
    "Alabama", "Alaska", "Arizona", "Arkansas", "California", "Colorado", "Connecticut",
    "Delaware", "Florida", "Georgia", "Hawaii", "Idaho", "Illinois", "Indiana", "Iowa",
    "Kansas", "Kentucky", "Louisiana", "Maine", "Maryland", "Massachusetts", "Michigan",
    "Minnesota", "Mississippi", "Missouri", "Montana", "Nebraska", "Nevada",
    "New Hampshire", "New Jersey", "New Mexico", "New York", "North Carolina",
    "North Dakota", "Ohio", "Oklahoma", "Oregon", "Pennsylvania", "Rhode Island",
    "South Carolina", "South Dakota", "Tennessee", "Texas", "Utah", "Vermont", "Virginia",
    "Washington", "West Virginia", "Wisconsin", "Wyoming"
]

df = df[df["State"].isin(us_states)].copy()
df["Labor Force Participation Rate, Total (%)"] = pd.to_numeric(
    df["Labor Force Participation Rate, Total (%)"], errors="coerce"
)

result = (
    df.groupby("State", dropna=False)["Labor Force Participation Rate, Total (%)"]
    .median()
    .reset_index(name="median_total_labor_force_participation_rate")
    .sort_values(
        ["median_total_labor_force_participation_rate", "State"],
        ascending=[False, True],
        kind="mergesort",
    )
    .reset_index(drop=True)
)

result = result.iloc[5:10].reset_index(drop=True)
answer = result["State"].tolist()
1.subquestion: Which states are ranked 6th through 10th by the median total labor force participation rate as of October 2019?

2.fact:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

source = "datagov/service-flat-file/files/rows.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), low_memory=False)

df["Report Year"] = pd.to_numeric(df["Report Year"], errors="coerce")
df = df[df["Report Year"] == 2022].copy()

state_map = {
    "AL": "Alabama", "AK": "Alaska", "AZ": "Arizona", "AR": "Arkansas", "CA": "California",
    "CO": "Colorado", "CT": "Connecticut", "DE": "Delaware", "FL": "Florida", "GA": "Georgia",
    "HI": "Hawaii", "ID": "Idaho", "IL": "Illinois", "IN": "Indiana", "IA": "Iowa",
    "KS": "Kansas", "KY": "Kentucky", "LA": "Louisiana", "ME": "Maine", "MD": "Maryland",
    "MA": "Massachusetts", "MI": "Michigan", "MN": "Minnesota", "MS": "Mississippi",
    "MO": "Missouri", "MT": "Montana", "NE": "Nebraska", "NV": "Nevada", "NH": "New Hampshire",
    "NJ": "New Jersey", "NM": "New Mexico", "NY": "New York", "NC": "North Carolina",
    "ND": "North Dakota", "OH": "Ohio", "OK": "Oklahoma", "OR": "Oregon", "PA": "Pennsylvania",
    "RI": "Rhode Island", "SC": "South Carolina", "SD": "South Dakota", "TN": "Tennessee",
    "TX": "Texas", "UT": "Utah", "VT": "Vermont", "VA": "Virginia", "WA": "Washington",
    "WV": "West Virginia", "WI": "Wisconsin", "WY": "Wyoming", "DC": "Washington D.C."
}

df["normalized_state"] = df["State"].map(state_map)
df = df[df["normalized_state"].notna()].copy()
df["Days Of Service Operated"] = pd.to_numeric(df["Days Of Service Operated"], errors="coerce")

result = (
    df.groupby("normalized_state", dropna=False)["Days Of Service Operated"]
    .std()
    .reset_index(name="sample_stddev_days_of_service_operated")
    .sort_values(
        ["sample_stddev_days_of_service_operated", "normalized_state"],
        ascending=[False, True],
        kind="mergesort",
    )
    .reset_index(drop=True)
)

result = result.iloc[7:12].reset_index(drop=True)
answer = result["normalized_state"].tolist()
2.subquestion: Which states are ranked 8th through 12th by the sample standard deviation of the number of days transit agencies provided revenue service during the 2022 fiscal year?

reasoning: Node 1: Keep only U.S. states, convert `Labor Force Participation Rate, Total (%)` to numeric, group by `State` to compute the median total labor force participation rate, sort by median descending and state ascending to break ties alphabetically, and take ranks 6 through 10.

Node 2: Keep records from report year 2022, map `State` abbreviations to full state names, convert `Days Of Service Operated` to numeric, group by normalized state to compute the sample standard deviation of days of service operated, sort by standard deviation descending and state ascending to break ties alphabetically, and take ranks 8 through 12.
Hop result: semantic intersection of <node 1 answer> and <node 2 answer> = Maryland.
